config.description: Gmail integration for sending emails via Google APIs

setup: 2. Download credentials.json and place it in the Digital_Employee directory
4. Visit the URL and authorize access
5. Copy the authorization code and run: node email_mcp.js set_auth_code <code>
tools: send_email - Send an email with support for plain text, HTML, CC, BCC
get_auth_url - Get OAuth2 authorization URL for authentication
set_auth_code - Set authorization code to complete OAuth flow
notes: Credentials are stored in credentials.json (auto-generated from Google Cloud Console)
Token is saved in token.json after first authorization
Set DRY_RUN=true in environment to test without sending actual emails
